name: A New Pokemon world
description:
ARE YOU READY FOR A NEW POKEMON WORLD?!

(This is entirely made up of creatures I created myself)

You'll have to go there, catch new Pokémon, and battle everyone again. You should prepare now and set off on your journey!
Dinosaur-like creatures have appeared; are they all Pokémon?...or ancient creatures?But the important thing isn't just capturing them...will you survive?

there is creature!
Don't forget to follow for more bot updates!
creator: RockyKalunger
